title: Use Modifier Component
description: Modifies use behavior, including how long the item takes to use and the player's movement speed.

emit_vibrations.description: Whether vibrations are emitted when the item starts or stops being used.

movement_modifier.description: Multiplier applied to the player's movement speed while the item is in use.

start_sound.description: Sound played when the item starts being used.

use_duration.description: Time, in seconds, that the item takes to use.
